tex:
Zachary asks the 30 students in his class which is their favourite sport.

The table shows the results.

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
Netball & Football & Hockey & Tennis \\
\hline
7 & 12 & 6 & 5 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
Complete the pictogram.

\begin{tabular}{|l|p{8cm}|}
\hline
Netball & \PictogramSymbol \PictogramSymbolThreeQuarter \\
\hline
Football & \\
\hline
Hockey & \\
\hline
Tennis & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

Key: \PictogramSymbol\ represents 4 people

tex:
(a) Find the value of $\sqrt{225}$.

(b) Write down the reciprocal of $\dfrac{2}{3}$.

(c) Work out three-quarters of one-third.

(d) Work out $-7 - (6 - 8)$.

(a) Write down the order of rotational symmetry of this diagram.

(b) On the diagram, draw all the lines of symmetry.

The stem-and-leaf diagram shows the number of hours that each of 16 students studied last week.

\begin{tabular}{r|l l l l l}
1 & 2 & 5 & 6 & 8 & \\
2 & 0 & 1 & 1 & 7 & 9 \\
3 & 2 & 3 & 4 & 5 & \\
4 & 4 & 5 & 7 & & \\
\end{tabular}

Key: $1|2$ represents 12 hours
Find

(a) the median,

(b) the mode,

(c) the range.

tex:
The volume of a cuboid is 24\,cm$^3$.\\
The base of the cuboid is 3\,cm by 2\,cm.

Draw a net of the cuboid on the 1\,cm$^2$ grid.

The travel graph shows a student's journey.

(a) Explain what is happening between 14\,20 and 14\,40.

(b) Complete the statement.

The student is travelling fastest between the times  and 

because

The probability that a train is late is 0.15.

Write down the probability that the train is not late.

Nazaneen changes \$6500 into 5798 euros at a bank.

Work out the exchange rate the bank uses.

Work out.

(a) $\begin{pmatrix} 6 \\ -5 \end{pmatrix} + \begin{pmatrix} 8 \\ -1 \end{pmatrix}$

(b) $3\begin{pmatrix} -4 \\ 7 \end{pmatrix}$

(a) Write down the mathematical name for a polygon with 5 sides.

(b) Work out the interior angle of a regular 18-sided polygon.

The $n$th term of a sequence is $6n - 4$.

(a) Write down the first 3 terms in this sequence.

{...}, , ]

(b) The $k$th term of this sequence is 422.

Work out the value of $k$.

The radius of a circle is 42\,cm.

Work out the circumference of the circle.\\
Give your answer in terms of $\pi$.
Change 680\,000\,cm$^3$ into m$^3$.

The length, $l$ metres, of a piece of rope is 5.67\,m, correct to the nearest centimetre.

Complete this statement about the value of $l$.

\[\text{} \leqslant l < \text{}\]

**Without using a calculator**, work out $1\dfrac{3}{8} - \dfrac{5}{6}$.

You must show all your working and give your answer as a fraction in its simplest form.

(a) Write $\dfrac{1}{2 \times 2 \times 2 \times 2 \times 2}$ as a power of 2.

(b) (i)  $3^{18} \div 3^t = 3^6$

Find the value of $t$.

 Simplify.
\[8w^{10} \times 6w^5\]

Annie invests \$8300 at a rate of 5.6\% per year compound interest.

Calculate the value of her investment at the end of 6 years.
Write down an irrational number, $n$, where $31 < n < 32$.

By rounding each number in the calculation correct to 1 significant figure, estimate the value of
\[\frac{38.7 \times 3.115}{20.3 - 4.1^2}.\]

You must show all your working.

There is a straight road between town $A$ and town $B$ of length 130\,km.

Maxi travels from town $A$ to town $B$.\\
Pippa travels from town $B$ to town $A$.\\
Both travel at a constant speed of 40\,km/h.\\
Maxi leaves 30 minutes before Pippa.

Work out how far from town $A$ they will be when they pass each other.
